name: Peanut Butter Dream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package topping mix and 2 cups milk (or frozen whipped topping)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the cream cheese until soft and fluffy.
2. Beat in the powdered sugar and peanut butter.
3. Fold in the topping mix and milk (or frozen whipped topping).
4. Pour the mixture into the baked pie shell.
5. Sprinkle with chopped peanuts.
6. Chill until firm.
